buildings.name: Building 33
buildings.notes: Main AI track venue. Connected to Building 34 via skybridge.

buildings.name: Building 25
buildings.notes: Data track venue. 10 min walk from Building 33.
buildings.cafeteria: Cafe 25 — open 7:00 AM to 3:00 PM. Best coffee on campus.

buildings.name: Building 40
buildings.notes: Security track venue. Near the Connector shuttle stop.

buildings.name: Building 18
buildings.notes: Cloud track venue. Closest building to the Visitor Center.
buildings.cafeteria: No cafeteria — use Cafe 16 next door (5 min walk)

buildings.name: Building 20
buildings.notes: DevTools track venue. Workshop room (Glacier Peak) has power at every seat.

shuttle.name: Connector Shuttle
shuttle.note: Free for all badge holders. Look for the blue Connector signs.

meals.breakfast: Available at all cafeterias from opening until 10:00 AM
meals.lunch: Served 11:30 AM to 1:30 PM at all cafeterias
meals.dinner: MVP Summit Welcome Dinner on March 25 at 6:00 PM in Building 92 Commons
meals.tip: Cafe 25 has the best espresso. Cafe 33 has the best lunch variety.

wifi.password: No password required. Accept terms on captive portal.

emergency.medical: Building 33 has a first aid station on Floor 1
